title: Envelope
description: Body of POST /v1/envelopes. See ARCHITECTURE_V0.md §8.5. The end-to-end test asserts the body contains exactly these five fields and no others (boundary-leakage check, §12).

answer.description: Plain text answer from the agent. No identifying fields, no chain-of-thought, no source memories.

nonce.description: Echoed verbatim from the question record returned by GET /v1/questions/open.

agent_signature.description: base64 Ed25519 signature over H(question_id || answer || nonce || delegation_hash), signed by the agent_key bound in delegation_token.
